hero.title: Every Second Counts.
hero.subtitle: BloodBridge AI connects Thalassemia patients with compatible blood donors across India — intelligently, instantly, and with compassion.

pulse.title: The Blood Pulse — Live Network
pulse.subtitle: Watch our AI-powered donor network pulse across India in real time

how.title: How the Pulse Works
how.subtitle: Our AI doesn't wait. The moment a patient needs blood, a smart Pulse ripples through the donor network.
how.step1_desc: A hospital or patient submits a blood request with type, location, and urgency.
how.step2_desc: Our engine ranks donors by blood compatibility, proximity, eligibility, and past response rate.
how.step3_desc: Top-matched donors are notified first. If no response in 10 mins, the pulse expands to the next tier.
how.step4_desc: Donor confirms with one tap. Coordinator tracks on dashboard. System learns for next time.
how.ai_subtitle: Multi-factor intelligence — not just blood type

about.title: About Blood Warriors
about.subtitle: A foundation built on hope, compassion, and technology.
about.body: Blood Warriors Foundation is a registered NGO founded in 2020, headquartered in Hyderabad. Our mission is to create a #ThalassemiaFreeIndia by 2035 through donor matching, awareness, and prevention. With over 10,000 new Thalassemia patients born in India every year and 1 million already battling the disorder, the need for a smarter, faster blood network has never been greater.
about.vision: A future where every child is born free of Thalassemia.
about.mission: Empowering communities to support Thalassemia patients through AI, awareness, and action.
about.founded: Established in 2020 in Hyderabad with a mission to make India Thalassemia-free by 2035.
about.condition_desc: Thalassemia is an inherited blood disorder where the body produces abnormal hemoglobin, leading to destruction of red blood cells and severe anaemia.
about.treatment_desc: Patients require regular blood transfusions every 15–20 days — for their entire lifetime. There is no cure without a bone marrow transplant, only lifelong management.
about.prevention_desc: Genetic testing before marriage can prevent Thalassemia. If both parents are carriers, there's a 25% chance each child will have the disease. Early screening saves lives.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Whether you want to donate, partner, or just learn more — we're here.
